reference: Hi, I just had an abortion two weeks ago and I feel really guilty and want to get pregnant again. I heard that the few weeks after an abortion have a high risk of getting pregnant again, so I wanted to know if I am still taking my prenatal vitamins and if having sex now increases the chance of me getting pregnant with pre-ejaculate fluid.
text: Hi, I just had an abortion two weeks ago, and I feel really guilty and want to get pregnant again. I heard that after an abortion, have a high risk of getting pregnant again. So I wanted to know if I am still taking my prenatal vitamins and if having sex now increases the chance of me getting pregnant with pre ejaculate fluid.
